title: WAMUL Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 03 Assistant Manager, Deputy Manager Posts
description: The West Assam Milk Producers Coo[erative Union Limited (WAMUL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 03 Senior Manager, Assistant Manager, and Deputy Manager Jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Electrical, Mechanical Engineering, MBA, B.Sc., M.Sc., can apply for the WAMUL Notification 2026. The interested applicants can ap...
